difficulties.label: Easy
difficulties.description: Warm up your brain with some friendly, beginner-level questions.

difficulties.label: Medium
difficulties.description: A balanced step up. Testing your core knowledge and logic.

difficulties.label: Hard
difficulties.description: Brutal. Intended for seasoned pros looking for a real challenge.

rules.title: 30 Questions Total
rules.body: 15 vocabulary questions followed by 15 grammar questions.

rules.title: Multiple Choice
rules.body: Each question has 4 choices — only one is correct.

rules.title: One Chance
rules.body: Select your answers on each page, then submit to move on.

rules.title: Scoring
rules.body: Each correct answer earns 1 point. Max score is 30.
